SQLLite.SQL: SELECT SE.EVENT_ID As "StandardEventId" , SE.DESCRIPTION As "StandardEventDescription" , SE.CATEGORY As "StandardEventCategory" , CASE WHEN CEV.CO_EVENT_SUB_TYPE IN ('AEALL','AEAO') THEN 'CAEO' ELSE CEV.CO_EVENT_SUB_TYPE END As "COType" FROM STANDARD_EVENTS SE, CO_EVENT_VALIDATIONS CEV WHERE ( SE.CATEGORY IN ('I','E','K','N') OR SE.EVENT_ID = '999' ) AND SE.EVENT_ID = CEV.STD_EVENT_ID

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper
